evals.name: smoke-test
evals.prompt: Build a minimal PDF using the cover-page + section-divider + branded-table components and save it to /tmp/smoke.pdf. Use the coastal theme.
expect: PDF file size > 200 KB (cover image embedded successfully)
First page is full-bleed Graphite → Charcoal greyscale gradient
Logo (icon-light.png) is centred and visible with its tonal shading intact
Header text 'COASTAL PROGRAMS' appears top-left from page 2 onwards

evals.name: audit-report
evals.prompt: Convert audit-output/corrynnes/markdown.md into a branded Coastal Programs PDF. Use callout-medium for medium severity, callout-low for low, callout-info for info findings.
expect: Cover page with title 'STACK AUDIT' and client name 'Corrynne's Natural Skincare'
TOC on page 2 matching the section dividers
All findings tables wrapped in .table-container (rounded corners)
